kw.name: Set Environment Variable
kw.msg: Environment variable 'PYTHONWARNINGS' set to value 'ignore:Unverified HTTPS request'.
kw.doc: Sets an environment variable to a specified value.

Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Create Ebay Session
Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=ebay, url=https://api.sandbox.ebay.com, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server
Crée une session HTTP pour eBay avec le token d'autorisation

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Get Request
kw.msg: Keyword 'RequestsLibrary.Get Request' is deprecated. Please use `GET On Session` instead.

C:\Users\Pc\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\Lib\site-packages\urllib3\connectionpool.py:1097: InsecureRequestWarning: Unverified HTTPS request is being made to host 'api.sandbox.ebay.com'. kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.msg: L'ID de commande est invalide. Test échoue comme prévu.: 400 != 200
kw.arg: L'ID de commande est invalide. Test échoue comme prévu.
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.
